description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp adorned with vibrant graffiti art on its exterior and interior surfaces. The structure features a high vertical drop on one end with a staircase and platform, and a continuous curved ramp surface for skating. Metal guardrails run along the top edges for safety, and the ramp is supported by a sturdy wooden frame. The graffiti includes various colorful characters and text, adding an urban, street-art aesthetic. There is an open space beneath the central platform, possibly for storage or passage. The overall design is robust and intended for high-impact recreational use in public parks or urban playgrounds.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal guardrails and colorful graffiti art, designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main graffiti-covered exterior wall, the high vertical drop with stairs, and the central open space beneath the platform.
description_view_1: Interior view of the half-pipe, highlighting the smooth wooden ramp surface and graffiti art on the inside walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional graffiti, the back of the platform, and the open space beneath the ramp.
description_view_3: Opposite interior view of the half-pipe, focusing on the curved ramp surface and the high drop-in platform with stairs.
